description: Container card with optional header (text + icon), body content via ChildContent, footer (string or RenderFragment), and three visual variants: Default, Elevated, and Outlined.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual style variant. Defaults to Default.

parameters.name: HeaderIcon
parameters.description: Optional icon shown in the header.

parameters.name: FooterContent
parameters.description: Optional footer RenderFragment. Takes precedence over Footer string.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS class(es) for the root element.

examples.title: Card with header and footer
examples.code: $24,500
